title: ranunculus kohistanensis
intro: Ranunculus kohistanensis, also known as Kohistan Crowsfoot, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus kohistanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves.
